message:
perf(agent): complete Arc<AssistantMessage> migration across agent lifecycle and session conversion

Extends the Arc<AssistantMessage> wrapping (from the previous commit)
to all remaining call sites that construct or destructure Message::Assistant:

- src/agent.rs: use Message::assistant() convenience constructor in
  abort and main agent loop paths; update update_partial_message()
  to accept Arc<AssistantMessage> directly; update finalize_assistant_message()
  to wrap in Arc once and Arc::clone for all event emissions, returning
  the inner value via Arc::try_unwrap; use (**arc).clone() for deep copy
  only when actually needed (stream-end recovery, abort partial)
- src/interactive/conversation.rs: last_assistant_message() uses
  .as_ref() to borrow through the Arc without cloning
- src/session.rs: Message→SessionMessage conversion uses
  Arc::try_unwrap to avoid cloning when refcount is 1;
  SessionMessage→Message conversion uses Message::assistant() constructor
- src/model.rs: normalize emoji literal to Unicode escape in proptest
  string strategy (cosmetic, avoids encoding ambiguity)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
